title: Forge Project Configuration
description: Schema for .forge/config.yaml — project-level declarative config for Forge language detection and auto-behavior settings

interfaces.description: System-facing interface types to test. Omit to use the union of all detected languages' default interfaces.

languages.description: Override auto-detected languages. Omit to use auto-detection from project file signals (go.mod, package.json, etc.).

test-framework.description: Override the test framework used for code generation. Built-in frameworks: go-testing, pytest, mocha, junit5, rust-test, maestro. Omit to use the default framework for the detected language. Any string value is accepted — custom frameworks are fully supported.

auto.description: Auto-behavior configuration for Forge pipeline. Each mode-scoped field has quick/full sub-keys. Omit the entire block for backward-compatible defaults.

e2eTest.description: Whether e2e test tasks are generated for each pipeline mode.

quick.description: Generate e2e test tasks (T-quick-1~4) in quick mode.

full.description: Generate e2e test tasks (T-test-1~4.5) in full mode.

consolidateSpecs.description: Whether spec-consolidation tasks are generated for each pipeline mode.

quick.description: Generate spec sync task (T-quick-specs-1) in quick mode.

full.description: Generate spec sync task (T-specs-1) in full mode.

cleanCode.description: Whether code-cleanup tasks are generated for each pipeline mode.

quick.description: Generate code cleanup task (T-clean-code-1) in quick mode.

full.description: Generate code cleanup task (T-clean-code-1) in full mode.

knowledgeSave.description: Whether auto knowledge extraction saves silently for each pipeline mode.

quick.description: Auto-save extracted knowledge in quick mode (no confirmation dialog).

full.description: Auto-save extracted knowledge in full mode (no confirmation dialog).

gitPush.description: Automatically push to remote after all-completed hook passes.

worktree.description: Worktree creation configuration. Omit the entire block for default behavior (create from HEAD, no file copying).

source-branch.description: Default source branch for worktree creation. Used when no --source-branch flag is provided.

copy-files.description: List of files to copy from project root to worktree after creation. Must be relative paths within the project root.
